---
title: "APIs"
---


Videolekce 1:29:38

- <https://cs50.harvard.edu/web/weeks/5/>

- <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x5trGVMKTdY&t=5380s>






### APIs

#### Movie 

- <https://developer.themovidb.org/docs/getting-started>
- <https://rapidapi.com/collection/rotten-tomatoes-api>

#### Meals

- <https://themealdb.com/api.php>
- <https://spoonacular.com/food-api>

#### Youtube

- <https://developers.google.com/youtube/v3>

#### Weather

- <https://openweathermap.org>
- <https://wunderground.com>

#### News

- <https://developer.nytimes.com/apis>

#### Book

- <https://developers.google.com/books>
- <https://openlibrary.org/developers/api>

#### Giphy SDK api

- <https://developers.giphy.com/branch/master/docs/sdk/>

#### rest countries

- <https://restcountries.com>

#### Gallery

- <https://unsplash.com/developers>
- <https://flick.com/services/api>
- <https://developers.gettyimages.com>
- <https://pexels.com/api>

#### Sports

- <https://api-sports.io>
- <https://developers.nfl.com/get-started/overview>
- <https://developer.sportradar.com/docs/read/Home>

#### Quotes

- <https://zenquotes.io>

#### Joke

- <https://sv443.net/jokeapi/v2>
- <https://dadjokes.io>

#### National park

- <https://nps.gov/subjects/developer/api-documentation.htm>

#### Dog

- <https://thedogapi.com>
- <https://dog.ceo/dog-api>

#### Cat

- <https://thecatapi.com>

### 50 projects 50 days

Inspirujte se.

- <https://github.com/bradtraversy/50projects50days>






## Úkol 
1. Zjistěte, jak funguje MIT licence.
2. Vyberte si free API a vytvořte stránku do svého portfolia, která libovolné API využívá.
